name: Gold
summary: Day 75 of Hormuz blockade. **GOLD $4,716.30/oz MAY 13 (+0.8% 1D, -2.3% 1M, -6.1% 3M) — UNDERPERFORMED ON 3-YEAR-HIGH CPI PRINT.** Expected on day of fully-confirmed oil-pass-through to US headline inflation (CPI 3.8% April three-year high; energy +17.9% YoY contributing >40% of headline gain): +1.5-2.5% spike. Got: +0.8% only. **WHY UNDERPERFORMING (markets dossier G2): US 10Y to 4.46% (+5bps) — REAL-YIELD CHANNEL competing with safe-haven bid; DXY +0.1% absorbing some flight quality; COMEX net longs still elevated near 3-year highs (crowded trade noted yesterday). MARKET TREATING THIS AS INFLATION EVENT (BAD FOR GOLD VS REAL YIELDS) NOT PURE RISK-OFF. If crisis regime shifts toward FINANCIAL-STRESS (Gulf bank in trouble, EM-debt crisis), gold spikes. Watch for that regime shift.** Silver $87.32 (+2.6% 1D, +10.0% 1M, +12.2% 3M) — industrial-demand component (solar/EV) + crisis-tail safe-haven bid; gold/silver ratio compressing. Copper $6.64/lb (+2.5% 1D, +9.5% 1M, +14.7% 3M) — 'Trade-not-war' Trump-Xi narrative bidding China demand proxy + Aramco/ADNOC Hormuz workaround signals real-economy stabilisation. Platinum +1.2% 1D / +2.5% 1M. Palladium +1.9% 1D / -4.1% 1M (auto-demand weakness persists). The CPI 3.8% confirms Fed cannot cut while Brent >$100; URA -5.0% (positioning unwind not thesis falsification); gold-vs-uranium decoupling reinforced — uranium gets crisis-AI premium, gold gets real-yield headwind. ORIGINAL CONTEXT (May 12): **GOLD $4,711.30/oz (-0.2% 1D) — TIRED LONG.** Expected on a day with VIX +6.9%, INR record low, Sensex -1.7%, Brent +1.3% on crisis news: gold should print +1-2%. Got: -0.2%. **WHY UNDERPERFORMING (UNCHANGED REGIME READ):** US 10Y yield 4.41% (+1.1% 1D, +2.2% 1M) — oil-driven inflation expectations keep real yields competitive vs zero-coupon gold; DXY +0.2% (modest USD strength on safe-haven flow INTO USD vs gold); cycle gold rally Mar-Apr to ~$5,050 → -6.7% off peak; COMEX positioning crowded. **ASSESSMENT: NO REGIME CHANGE FROM YESTERDAY'S READ. Gold is signaling this is an INFLATION + FLOW event (negative for gold via real-yield channel), NOT a financial-system-stress event (which would force gold above $5,000).** Cleanest reversal signal would be: Gulf-exposed bank reports unexpected Q1 loss, or European-bank with ME exposure shows CDS stress. Neither visible. **Gold remains a tired long.** **B8 PM MODI MAY 10-11 HYDERABAD ADDRESS asked Indians to DEFER GOLD PURCHASES (incl. weddings) FOR ONE YEAR** — targets India's ~$50bn/yr gold import drain (FX-pressure relief), but the demand-shock implication for gold itself is muted: India's wedding-season gold buying is 600-700t per year; even a 30-50% deferral would shave 200-300t = ~3-5% of global ~6,000t mine output. Modest bearish overhang. **TRIGGER WATCH: If Brent breaks $115 AND VIX >22, gold should make fresh run at $4,850. Until then, real yields dominate.** Silver $85.42 (-0.1% 1D, +13.1% 1M) — industrial-demand component (solar/EV) holding; gold/silver bifurcation continues. Copper $6.46/lb (+0.7% 1D, +8.1% 1M, +11.9% 3M) — AI infra + supply-side tightness; bid intact. Platinum -0.9% 1D; Palladium -0.9% 1D / -4.4% 1M (auto-demand weakness).

current.regime: TIRED LONG — UNDERPERFORMED ON 3-YEAR-HIGH CPI. April CPI 3.8% (BLS May 12) with energy +17.9% YoY contributing >40% of headline gain should have spiked gold +1.5-2.5%; got +0.8% only. US 10Y to 4.46% (+5bps) = real-yield channel competing with safe-haven bid; DXY +0.1% absorbing some flight quality; COMEX net longs crowded. Market treating as INFLATION EVENT (bad for gold via real yields) NOT pure RISK-OFF. Cleanest reversal trigger: financial-stress regime shift (Gulf bank in trouble, EM-debt crisis) = gold breaks $5,000+ within days. Until then, real yields dominate.
current.watching_threshold: Gulf-bank or European-bank with ME exposure shows stress = gold breaks $5,000+ within days. Until then, TIRED. Pre-crisis Feb baseline ~$2,920; March-Apr highs ~$5,050; current $4,720 = -6.5% from peak. Bifurcation in metals complex: copper +2.0% / +8.7% MoM bidding on AI infra; gold/silver/platinum stalling — confirms inflation/flow regime over financial-stress regime.

active_triggers.condition: US 10Y real yield falls 15bps in 3 sessions (inflation-regime trigger — more predictive than crisis-escalation)
Gulf-exposed bank reports unexpected Q1 loss OR Hormuz-action triggers CEF forced closure → credit stress routes into gold
Gold breaks $4,850+ on continued IRGC operations Thursday-Friday — crisis-beta thesis re-opens, regime call wrong-framed
Gold sustains above $4,600 for 3+ sessions = regime-shift confirmation (DOLLAR-WEAKNESS or financial-system-risk regime)
active_triggers.activation_note: $4,678.70 on May 6 = Day 1 above $4,600 in current cycle; rally is dominantly DXY-driven. If sustains 3 sessions, dollar-weakness regime confirmed → multi-quarter EM-bullish setup

active_triggers.condition: BlackRock Rick Rieder confirmed/announced as next Fed chair — dollar-weakness regime confirmed

recent_signals.headline: SUNDAY HOLIDAY — GOLD $4,730.70 MAY 8 CLOSE per markets dossier (+0.7% 1D, -1.3% 1M, -5.5% 3M); STILL UNDERPERFORMING DESPITE ACCUMULATING UNPRICED CRISIS NEWS (Sunday bulk-carrier-near-Doha strike, Kharg satellite slick, Bahrain 41 IRGC detentions, UAE engagement scale refined, Hezbollah-IDF Day 14). REGIME ASSESSMENT: gold continues to signal INFLATION + FLOW event (negative for gold via real-yield channel) and NOT financial-system stress event. VIX 17.19 cycle-low + S&P record + US 10Y at 4.36% + crisis events fail to bid gold = inflation/flow regime over financial-stress regime confirmed. **TIRED LONG until a Gulf-bank or European-bank with ME exposure shows stress = gold breaks $5,000+ within days.** Metals complex bifurcating: copper $6.30/lb (+2.8% 1D, +9.5% 1M) bidding on AI infra demand; gold/silver/platinum stalling. Silver $80.86 (+1.5% 1D, +6.0% 1M); copper +2.8% 1D / +9.5% 1M (China stimulus + AI infra); palladium -2.0% 1D (auto-demand weakness). **The non-mover IS the signal — if markets actually feared kinetic restart, gold would be at $5,000+. Instead, gold flat-to-down while AI semis +30% MoM tells you the marginal $1 of geopolitical-hedge capital is going to Korean memory, not bullion.** Decision-relevant: if MOU signs, gold continues flat-to-down; if Iran rejects past May 21, gold gets war-risk re-bid back toward $4,850-5,000.
recent_signals.verification: CONFIRMED price tape multi-source ($4,730.70 markets dossier vs $4,720.40 yfinance prior — minor settlement vs intraday); regime assessment CONFIRMED via cross-asset disambiguation (VIX low + S&P record + 10Y not new highs + crisis events fail to bid gold)

recent_signals.headline: GOLD $4,720.40 MAY 8 CLOSE (+0.4% 1D, -1.5% 1M, -6.5% 3M) — STILL UNDERPERFORMING ON CRISIS DAY (HORMUZ DAY 71, MAY 7 DESTROYER ATTACK, MAY 8 SECOND TANKER DISABLING + CENTCOM 70-TANKER BLOCKADE SCALE + MOKHBER 'ATOMIC-BOMB' SPEECH); EXPECTED HARD BID, ACTUAL +0.4%. **REGIME ASSESSMENT: gold signaling INFLATION + FLOW event (negative for gold via real-yield channel), NOT financial-system stress event.** US 10Y at 4.36% kept real yields competitive vs gold; gold rallied to ~$5,050 March-April peak then -6.5% 3M = exhaustion at top. VIX cycle-low + US 10Y not making new highs + S&P at record reinforces this read. **TIRED LONG until a Gulf-bank or European-bank with ME exposure shows stress = gold breaks $5,000+ within days.** Metals complex bifurcating: copper +2.0% 1D / +8.7% 1M (AI infra demand); gold/silver/platinum stalling. The '$4,600 sustained 3+ sessions' trigger long resolved — refocusing on Gulf-bank-stress trigger.

recent_signals.headline: GOLD $4,732.40 (+1.1%) — DAY 2 OF '$4,600 SUSTAINED 3+ SESSIONS' TRIGGER ON TRACK. DOLLAR-WEAKNESS REGIME INTACT (DXY 98.03, Rieder Fed-chair speculation, Trump weak-dollar comments). On a peace-dividend day with S&P record, gold should be flat — fact that gold is RISING means dollar-weakness regime DOMINANT, not crisis. Disambiguation ~85% dollar / ~15% war-risk residual. Silver +2.9%, copper +1.0%, platinum +1.6% confirm USD weakness mechanical. Decision-relevant binary: dollar-driven gold = bullish EM tailwind incl India once RBI eases; war-risk-driven gold = bearish for risk assets incl India.
